privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated Snipe-IT manufacturer database entries (canonical and duplicate manufacturers for Dell, HP, and Lenovo) injected via setup_task.sh. The Cisco contact details (1-800-553-2447 and tac@cisco.com) provided in the task description match real-world Cisco TAC information and are properly enforced by the verifier logic. All scoring weights detailed in the metadata exactly match the points distributed across conditions C1 to C11 in verifier.py.
